response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong technical credentials with 19 years of software development and solid developer-tools experience, the resume shows zero formal people management experience—a critical requirement for this full-time people-leadership role. The position explicitly requires 2 years in people management, but there is no evidence of hiring, team building, performance feedback, or organizational leadership. The candidate appears optimized for senior individual contributor roles rather than management tracks.
strengths: 19 years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems demonstrates deep technical breadth required for system design and code review
Hands-on developer tools and testing infrastructure experience (CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Fluent-Asserts and Trial) directly aligns with engineering productivity focus
Track record of technical mentorship through workshops, Refactoring Dojos, and open-source leadership demonstrates capability to guide and develop engineers
concerns: No formal people management or team leadership experience despite 2-year requirement—no evidence of direct reports, hiring, 1-on-1s, or performance management
Only 2 years of explicit developer tools experience (Altom 2016-2018) falls short of required 3 years; most recent role is as individual contributor staff engineer
Last significant mobile platform work ended in 2016 (WatchUp iOS/Apple TV); preferred mobile knowledge qualification is outdated by current standards and ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Technical depth and developer tools background
Insufficient developer tools tenure and stale mobile platform experience
